audit_response_summary.finding_1_ci_guard_not_wired: FIXED — pr-checks.yml step added (Audit Material Symbols glyph coverage) + ci.yml Build job pre-step added. Guard now runs on every PR and every main build.
audit_response_summary.finding_2_comment_harvest: FIXED — stripComments() exported from subset-material-symbols.mjs now removes both line and block comments before the regex pass; the comment-sourced icon_name token is no longer harvested (verified by the two new 'does NOT harvest icon names from block/line-comment text' tests).
audit_response_summary.finding_3_cli_tests_missing: FIXED — test suite expanded from 21 to 56 cases covering main('--help'), main([]), main(['--verify']) both clean and drift, main(['--check-size']) above/below threshold and missing, verify() audit-missing early-return, verify() unresolved-dynamic-sites exit-1 path, regenerate() integration with mocked subsetFont (happy path + unresolved-sites log path), scanRepo() repoRoot override, and every coveredPatterns branch in resolveDynamicSites.
audit_response_summary.finding_4_cn_clsx_scanner_miss: FIXED — scanner rewritten as a two-stage scan-based extractor (findMarkerOpenings + LITERAL_CHILD_RE/DYNAMIC_CHILD_RE). Tests cover cn(), clsx(), template-literal, and ternary className wrappers (6 new test cases).
audit_response_summary.finding_5_coverage_proxy: FIXED — real Istanbul coverage run with a dedicated vitest config at tools/scripts/__tests__/pg195.vitest.config.ts; actuals recorded in kpi_results.coverage_* fields above and in artifacts/coverage/pg-195/coverage-summary.json.
audit_response_summary.finding_6_lighthouse_unmeasured: UNCHANGED — blocked by apps/api pre-existing errors. Remains the reason for NEEDS_HUMAN verdict.
audit_response_summary.finding_7_ac9_wording: FIXED — spec AC #9 reworded to match reality (scanner tests run via root project include glob; web test filter is orthogonal).
audit_response_summary.finding_8_icon_prop_false_positives: DOCUMENTED — ICON_PROP_RE intentionally broad; subset-font ignores unknown glyphs so false positives don't bloat the font, only slightly inflate the audit icons_count. False-positive mitigation (scope to material-symbols files or whitelist) deferred as a tooling-quality follow-up.
audit_response_summary.finding_9_hash_integrity: RE-HASHED — all artifact hashes in this attestation re-captured after the scanner rewrite + test expansion + CI wiring commits.

notes: Second-pass implementation addresses the nine audit findings. The three HIGH/MEDIUM findings that affected correctness (CI guard not wired, comments harvested as icons, cn()/clsx()-wrapped spans silently missed, CLI/integration tests missing, coverage measured by proxy instead of Istanbul) are all FIXED and verified. The scanner now detects icons inside every className form observed in the repo (direct string, cn/clsx, template literal, ternary) and strips comments before harvesting. Real Istanbul coverage is 97.5% statements / 80.18% branches / 91.3% functions / 98.16% lines — all ≥ the project thresholds. 56/56 tests pass including drift simulation, verify happy-path, check-size boundary, and regenerate integration with mocked subset-font. CI guard wired into both pr-checks.yml (Quality Checks job) and ci.yml (Build Artifacts pre-step). Remaining BLOCKER: `@intelliflow/web` typecheck+lint+build still fail on PRE-EXISTING apps/api/src/modules/contact/** uncommitted work, which means Lighthouse evidence for AC #5/#6 cannot be captured from a clean production build in this session. Git Safety Guard correctly blocks `git stash` from this session. Verdict remains NEEDS_HUMAN — user must resolve the apps/api/contact pre-existing state manually, then rerun /full-pipeline PG-195 to complete Steps 11 (Lighthouse /404 + /500), 13 (visual smoke test), and 14 (the 4 mandatory validations against a clean tree).
